hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with ProcessHeaderContexts as ( select Context from ProcessHeader union select InstanceMetrics from ProcessHeader union select ProcessMetrics from ProcessHeader union all select tp.Id from ProcessHeaderContexts phc inner join TablePartMetadata tp on phc.Context = tp.TablePartOwner ) select e.[Uid], e.[Namespace], e.[Name], p.[Name] as PropertyName, p.[Uid] as PropertyUid, p.SubTypeUid, p.RelationTableName from ProcessHeaderContexts phc inner join MD_ENTITY e on e.Id=phc.Context left join MD_ENTITY_PROPERTY p on p.OwnerId=e.Id where p.SubTypeUid<>:emptyUid
with cte as ( select [ServerConnectionUid] from [WorkflowQueueItem] with(rowlock, readpast) where [ServerConnectionUid] = :serverConnectionUid ) update cte set [ServerConnectionUid] = null

with cte as ( select boi.[Status] from [BackgroundOperationInfo] boi with(rowlock, readpast) inner join [WorkflowQueueItem] wqi on wqi.[BackgroundOperation] = boi.[Id] where wqi.[ServerConnectionUid] is null and boi.[Status] = :activeStatus ) update cte set [Status] = :pendingStatus

with cte as ( select &&ServerConnectionUid&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& with(rowlock, readpast) where &&ServerConnectionUid&& is not null and &&LastTouchDate&& < :lastTouchDate ) update cte set &&ServerConnectionUid&& = null

with cte as ( select top(:count) wqi.Id, wqi.ServerConnectionUid, wqi.Instance, wqi.LastTouchDate, wqi.ServerConnectionName from [WorkflowQueueItem] wqi with (rowlock, readpast) where [ServerConnectionUid] is null and [BackgroundOperation] is null and [NextExecuteDate] <= :currentTimestamp and [Attempt] < :attemptLength order by wqi.Attempt, wqi.CreationDate ) update cte set ServerConnectionUid = :serverConnectionUid, LastTouchDate = :currentTimestamp, ServerConnectionName = :serverConnectionName output inserted.Id, inserted.Instance

with cte as ( select top(:count) wqi.Id, wqi.ServerConnectionUid, wqi.Instance, wqi.LastTouchDate, wqi.ServerConnectionName from [WorkflowQueueItem] wqi with (rowlock, readpast) where [ServerConnectionUid] is null and not [BackgroundOperation] is null and [NextExecuteDate] <= :currentTimestamp and [Attempt] < :attemptLength order by wqi.Attempt, wqi.CreationDate ) update cte set ServerConnectionUid = :serverConnectionUid, LastTouchDate = :currentTimestamp, ServerConnectionName = :serverConnectionName output inserted.Id, inserted.Instance

with cte as ( select top(:count) * from [WfInstanceMigrationPackage] wimp with (rowlock, readpast) where wimp.[Status] in (0, 4) order by wimp.[CreationDate] desc ) update cte set [Status] = 1 output inserted.[Id], inserted.[Uid], inserted.[Name], inserted.[CreationDate], inserted.[CreationAuthor], inserted.[Status], inserted.[WorkflowProcess], inserted.[MigrationReason]

select ph.Id from PROCESSHEADER ph inner join RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM rm on rm.BPMNPROCESS = ph.PUBLISHED left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join OrganizationItemUsers du on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and du.ORGANIZATIONITEMID = dep.ID left join UserSecuritySetCache agu on rm.workertype=:usergrouptype and agu.GroupId=rm.WORKERID where ph.Parent is null and ph.RunAvailability in(:RunAvailability) and ph.Status = :publishedStatus and rm.HASSTARTEVENT = 1 and ( (dep.USERID in (:userfilter) or rm.WORKERTYPE = :orgitemtype and du.USERID in (:userfilter)) or (rm.workertype = :usergrouptype and agu.UserId in (:userfilter)) )

procedure.name: LoadProcessGroupTree

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select Id, Name, ParentId from LoadProcessGroupTree() order by Name

procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION [LoadProcessGroupTree]() RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( with Rec(Id, Name, Parent) AS ( select pg.Id, pg.Name, pg.Parent from PROCESSGROUP pg where pg.Parent is null UNION ALL select pgt.Id, pgt.Name, pgt.Parent from PROCESSGROUP pgt INNER JOIN Rec ON Rec.Id = pgt.Parent ) select Id, Name, Parent as ParentId from Rec )

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select distinct ph.Id as Id, ph.Name as Name, ph.ParentGroup as ParentId from ProcessHeader ph with (nolock) inner join RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM rm with (nolock) on rm.BPMNPROCESS = ph.PUBLISHED left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join OrganizationItemUsers du with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and du.ORGANIZATIONITEMID = dep.ID left join (SELECT GroupId FROM GetGroupsForUsers(:userId)) gu on 1=1 where (ph.Published is not null) and (ph.Status = :publishedStatus) and (rm.ResponsibilityLevel in (:responsibilityLevel) and ( (dep.USERID = :userId or rm.WORKERTYPE = :orgitemtype and du.USERID = :userId) or (rm.workertype = :usergrouptype and gu.GroupId = rm.workerId) )) or (rm.isCurator = :isCurator and ( (dep.USERID = :userId or rm.WORKERTYPE = :orgitemtype and du.USERID = :userId) or (rm.workertype = :usergrouptype and gu.GroupId = rm.workerId) )) union select distinct Id as Id, Name as Name, ParentGroup as ParentId from ProcessHeader where Id in ( select p.ProcessHeader from ProcessHeaderPermission p inner join UserSecuritySetCache c on p.UserSecuritySetCacheId = c.SetId where c.UserId = :userId and p.PermissionId = :permissionId )

select rm.Id as Id, rm.ResponsibilityLevel, rm.IsCurator, wp.Header as ProcessHeader from RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM rm inner join WorkflowProcess wp on rm.BPMNProcess = wp.Id left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join OrganizationItemUsers du on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and du.ORGANIZATIONITEMID = dep.ID left join UserSecuritySetCache agu on rm.workertype=:usergrouptype and agu.GroupId=rm.WORKERID where rm.BPMNPROCESS in (:processId) and ( (dep.USERID in (:userfilter) or rm.WORKERTYPE = :orgitemtype and du.USERID in (:userfilter)) or (rm.workertype = :usergrouptype and agu.UserId in (:userfilter)) )

with Rec as ( select ph.Name, cast(null as nvarchar(max)) as TablePartName, e.Id, e.Uid, e.TableName from WorkflowProcess wp inner join ProcessContext pc on wp.Context=pc.Id inner join MD_ENTITY e on e.Id=pc.Id inner join ProcessHeader ph on wp.Header=ph.Id where (ph.Published=wp.Id) or ph.[Current]=wp.Id union all select Rec.Name, e.DisplayName, tp.Id, tp.TablePartPropertyUid, e.TableName from TablePartMetadata tp inner join Rec on Rec.Id=tp.TablePartOwner inner join MD_ENTITY e on e.Id=tp.Id ) select Rec.Name as ProcessName, Rec.TablePartName, case when Upper(ep.RelationTableName)=Upper(:tableName) then ep.DisplayName else null end as PropertyName from Rec left join MD_ENTITY_PROPERTY ep on ep.OwnerId=Rec.Id and ep.Uid<>:ownerUid where Upper(Rec.TableName)=Upper(:tableName) and Rec.Uid<>:ownerUid or Upper(ep.RelationTableName)=Upper(:tableName)

with Rec as ( select ph.Name as pName, cast(null as nvarchar(max)) as TablePartName, e.Id, e.Uid, e.Name from WorkflowProcess wp inner join ProcessContext pc on wp.Context=pc.Id inner join MD_ENTITY e on e.Id=pc.Id inner join ProcessHeader ph on wp.Header=ph.Id where (ph.Published=wp.Id) or ph.[Current]=wp.Id union all select Rec.pName, e.DisplayName, tp.Id, tp.TablePartPropertyUid, e.Name from TablePartMetadata tp inner join Rec on Rec.Id=tp.TablePartOwner inner join MD_ENTITY e on e.Id=tp.Id ) select Rec.pName as ProcessName, Rec.TablePartName from Rec where Upper(Rec.Name)=Upper(:className)

select distinct ph.Id as Id, ph.Name as Name, ph.ParentGroup as ParentId, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.CurrentInstanceCount else ci.CurrentInstanceEmlCount end) as AvailableCount, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.ActiveTasksCount else ci.ActiveTasksEmlCount end) as AssignToMeCount, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.CompletedInstanceCount else ci.CompletedInstanceEmlCount end) as CompleteCount, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.TerminatedInstanceCount else ci.TerminatedInstanceEmlCount end) as InterruptedCount from ProcessHeader ph with (nolock) left join MonitorCacheItem ci on ci.ProcessHeader = ph.Id and (:filterByMembers = 0 and ci.[User] is null or ci.[User] = :currentUser) where (:processHeaderId = 0 or ph.Id = :processHeaderId) and (ph.Published is not null) and (ph.Status = :publishedStatus) and (:filterByMembers = 0 or exists( select wi.Id from WorkflowInstance wi with (nolock) inner join WorkflowInstanceMember wim with (nolock) on wim."User" = :currentUser and wi.Id = wim.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wp with (nolock) on wp.Id = wi.Process where wp.Header = ph.Id )) order by ph.Name

select distinct p.PermissionId as PermissionId from ProcessHeaderPermission p inner join UserSecuritySetCache c on p.UserSecuritySetCacheId = c.SetId where p.ProcessHeader = :headerId and c.UserId in (:userfilter)

WITH wfi AS ( SELECT wi.Id, wp.Header as Header FROM WorkflowInstance as wi, WorkflowProcess as wp WHERE wi.Id = :instanceId AND wi.Process = wp.Id and wi.Status not in (:deleteStatuses) UNION ALL SELECT wi.Id, wp.Header as Header FROM WorkflowInstance as wi, wfi, WorkflowProcess as wp WHERE wfi.Id = wi.ParentInstance AND wi.Process = wp.Id ), wfp AS ( SELECT Id, Header as Header FROM WorkflowProcess WHERE Id = :processId UNION ALL SELECT wp.Id, wp.Header as Header FROM WorkflowProcess as wp, wfp WHERE wfp.Id = wp.Parent ) SELECT wfi.Id as WfiId, wfp.Id as ProcessId FROM wfi, wfp WHERE wfi.Header = wfp.Header

select ph.Id as Id, ph.Name as Name, ph.ParentGroup as ParentId, ph.[Parent] as ParentProcessId, subq.AvailableCount as AvailableCount, subqt.AssignToMeCount as AssignToMeCount, subq.CompleteCount as CompleteCount, subq.InterruptedCount as InterruptedCount, coalesce(dep.UserId,oiu.UserId) OwnerId,
case when rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype then rm.WorkerType else case when us.id is not null then rm.WorkerType else null end end
OwnerType, case when rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype then du.Name else case when us.id is not null then us.FullName else dep.name end end OwnerName, ph.[Status] Status from ProcessHeader ph with (nolock) left join ( select head.Id as Id, sum(case when wi.Status in (:AvailableStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as AvailableCount, sum(case when wi.Status in (:CompleteStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as CompleteCount, sum(case when wi.Status in (:InterruptedStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as InterruptedCount from WorkflowInstance wi with (nolock) inner join WorkflowProcess wp with (nolock) on wp.Id = wi.Process inner join ProcessHeader head with (nolock) on head.Id = wp.Header where coalesce(wi.isemulation,0)=:isemulationInstans group by head.Id ) as subq on subq.Id = ph.Id
left join ( select WorkerId, WorkerType, BPMNPROCESS from RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM with (nolock) where ResponsibilityLevel = 2 group by WorkerId, WorkerType, BPMNPROCESS ) as rm on rm.BPMNPROCESS=ph.PUBLISHED left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join "User" us with (nolock) on dep.UserId = us.id left join OrganizationItemUsers oiu with (nolock) on dep.Id=oiu.OrganizationItemId and oiu.userid = us.id left join UserGroup du with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype and du.id = rm.WORKERID
left join ( select phe.Id as Id, count(tb.Id) as AssignToMeCount from TaskBase tb with (nolock) inner join WorkflowBookmark wb with (nolock) on wb.Id = tb.WorkflowBookmark inner join WorkflowInstance wi with (nolock) on wi.Id = wb.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wpr with (nolock) on wpr.Id = wi.Process
inner join ProcessHeader phe with (nolock) on phe.Id = wpr.Header where (tb.Status in (:activeTaskStatuses)) and coalesce(tb.isemulation,0)=:isemulationTask group by phe.Id ) as subqt on subqt.Id = ph.Id where ph.Published is not null and (:noSearchNameProcess =0 or upper(ph.Name) like :NameProcess) and (0 in (:listUser ) or (rm.WorkerId in ( select distinct oi.id from "ORGANIZATIONITEM" oi with (nolock) left join "User" u with (nolock) on oi.UserId=u.id and u.id in (:listUser) left join OrganizationItemUsers oiu with (nolock) on oi.Id=oiu.OrganizationItemId and oiu.userid in (:listUser) where (oiu.UserId is not null or u.id is not null) ) and rm.workertype = :orgitemtype))
order by Name

select ph.Id as Id, ph.Name as Name, ph.CreationDate, ph.CreationAuthor as CreationAuthorId, u.FullName as CreationAuthor, ph.ParentGroup as ParentId, ph.[Parent] as ParentProcessId, coalesce(dep.UserId, oiu.UserId) WorkerId, case when rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype then rm.WorkerType else case when us.id is not null then rm.WorkerType else null end end WorkerType, case when rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype then du.Name else case when us.id is not null then us.FullName else dep.name end end WorkerName, wp.VersionNumber, ph.PUBLISHED as CurrentVersionId, ph.[Status] as Status from ProcessHeader ph with (nolock) inner join WorkflowProcess wp with (nolock) on wp.Id = ph.PUBLISHED left join "User" u with (nolock) on u.Id = ph.CreationAuthor left join ( select WorkerId, WorkerType, BPMNPROCESS from RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM with (nolock) where ResponsibilityLevel = 2 group by WorkerId, WorkerType, BPMNPROCESS ) rm on rm.BPMNPROCESS = ph.PUBLISHED left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join UserGroup du with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :usergroupitemtype and du.id = rm.WORKERID left join "User" us with (nolock) on dep.UserId = us.id left join OrganizationItemUsers oiu with (nolock) on dep.Id=oiu.OrganizationItemId and oiu.userid = us.id where ph.PUBLISHED is not null

select {processHeader.*} from PROCESSHEADER {processHeader} with (nolock) where {processHeader}.Published is not null and {processHeader}.Id in ( select wp.Header from RESPONSIBILITYMATRIXITEM rm with (nolock) left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and dep.Id = rm.WORKERID left join OrganizationItemUsers du with (nolock) on rm.workertype = :orgitemtype and du.ORGANIZATIONITEMID = dep.ID left join UserSecuritySetCache agu with (nolock) on rm.workertype=:usergrouptype and agu.GroupId=rm.WORKERID inner join WorkflowProcess wp with (nolock) on rm.BPMNPROCESS = wp.Id inner join ProcessHeader ph with (nolock) on ph.Id = wp.Header where ph.Published = wp.Id and (rm.ResponsibilityLevel = 2 or rm.IsCurator = 1) and ((dep.USERID = :userfilter or rm.WORKERTYPE = :orgitemtype and du.USERID = :userfilter) or (rm.workertype = :usergrouptype and agu.UserId = :userfilter)) )

select ph.Id as Id, ph.Name as Name, subq.AvailableCount as AvailableCount, subqt.AssignToMeCount as AssignToMeCount, subq.CompleteCount as CompleteCount, subq.InterruptedCount as InterruptedCount, subq.AvailableCountEml as AvailableCountEml, subqt.AssignToMeCountEml as AssignToMeCountEml, subq.CompleteCountEml as CompleteCountEml, subq.InterruptedCountEml as InterruptedCountEml from ProcessHeader ph left join ( select head.Id as Id, sum(case when wi.Status in (:AvailableStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as AvailableCount, sum(case when wi.Status in (:CompleteStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CompleteCount, sum(case when wi.Status in (:InterruptedStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as InterruptedCount, sum(case when wi.Status in (:AvailableStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as AvailableCountEml, sum(case when wi.Status in (:CompleteStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CompleteCountEml, sum(case when wi.Status in (:InterruptedStatus) and coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as InterruptedCountEml from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process inner join ProcessHeader head on head.Id = wp.Header group by head.Id ) as subq on subq.Id = ph.Id left join ( select phe.Id as Id, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as AssignToMeCount, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as AssignToMeCountEml from TaskBase tb inner join WorkflowBookmark wb on wb.Id = tb.WorkflowBookmark inner join WorkflowInstance wi on wi.Id = wb.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wpr on wpr.Id = wi.Process inner join ProcessHeader phe on phe.Id = wpr.Header where (tb.Status in (:activeTaskStatuses)) group by phe.Id ) as subqt on subqt.Id = ph.Id left join WorkflowProcess wp on ph.Published = wp.Id

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status = :wiStatus

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status = :wiStatus and exists(select Id from WorkflowInstanceMember where "User" = :currentUser and Instance = wi.Id)

select m.[User] as Id, count(distinct wi.Id) as CountRes from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process inner join WorkflowInstanceMember m on m.Instance = wi.Id where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status = :wiStatus and coalesce(wi.isemulation,0)=:isEmulation group by m.[User]

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status in (:wiStatus)

select m.[User] as Id, count(distinct wi.Id) as CountRes from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process inner join WorkflowInstanceMember m on m.Instance = wi.Id where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status in (:wiStatus) and coalesce(wi.isemulation,0)=:isEmulation group by m.[User]

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(wi.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from WorkflowInstance wi inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = wi.Process where wp.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.Status in (:wiStatus) and exists(select Id from WorkflowInstanceMember where "User" = :currentUser and Instance = wi.Id)

select sum(case when coalesce(tb.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(tb.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from TaskBase tb inner join WorkflowBookmark wb on wb.Id = tb.WorkflowBookmark inner join WorkflowInstance wi on wi.Id = wb.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wpr on wpr.Id = wi.Process where wpr.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.Status in (:wiStatus))

select sum(case when coalesce(tb.IsEmulation,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as CountRes, sum(case when coalesce(tb.IsEmulation,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as CountResEml from TaskBase tb inner join WorkflowBookmark wb on wb.Id = tb.WorkflowBookmark inner join WorkflowInstance wi on wi.Id = wb.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wpr on wpr.Id = wi.Process where wpr.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.Status in (:wiStatus)) and tb.[Executor] = :currentUser

select tb.[Executor] as Id, count(tb.Id) as CountRes from TaskBase tb inner join WorkflowBookmark wb on wb.Id = tb.WorkflowBookmark inner join WorkflowInstance wi on wi.Id = wb.Instance inner join WorkflowProcess wpr on wpr.Id = wi.Process where wpr.Header = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.Status in (:wiStatus)) and coalesce(tb.IsEmulation,0)=:isEmulation group by tb.[Executor]

procedure.name: EntityModelHistoryWorkflowInstanceTasksUpdated

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: EXEC EMH_WorkflowInstanceTasksUpdated :CreationDate, :CreationAuthor, :ActionTypeUid, :Instance

procedure.name: FindProcessesByHeaderUid

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: execute FindProcessesByHeaderUid :ProcessHeaderUid

procedure.text:
create procedure FindProcessesByHeaderUid @ProcessHeaderUid uniqueidentifier as begin
with RootHeader as ( select p.[Uid], p.Parent, 0 as lvl from ProcessHeader p where p.[Uid] = @ProcessHeaderUid union all select ph.[Uid], ph.Parent, RootHeader.lvl + 1 from ProcessHeader ph inner join RootHeader on RootHeader.Parent = ph.Id ), TopRecord as ( select top 1 RootHeader.[Uid], RootHeader.lvl from RootHeader order by RootHeader.lvl desc ), FindProcesses as ( select p.Id, wp.[Uid] from ProcessHeader p inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = p.[Current] inner join TopRecord tr on tr.[Uid] = p.[Uid] union all select ph.Id, wp.[Uid] from ProcessHeader ph inner join WorkflowProcess wp on wp.Id = ph.[Current] inner join FindProcesses on FindProcesses.Id = ph.Parent ) select [Uid] from FindProcesses; return end

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: delete from FormDependencies where DependObjectUid is null and DependObjectFormUid is null and UsesObjectFormUid is null and [Type] is null and UsesObjectUid in (:ProcessUids)

script.name: FillWorkflowInstanceParents1
script.text: with Rec as ( select [Id] Child, [ParentInstance] Parent from [WorkflowInstance] where not [ParentInstance] is null union all select Rec.[Child], wi.[ParentInstance] from [WorkflowInstance] wi inner join Rec on Rec.[Parent] = wi.[Id] and not wi.[ParentInstance] is null ) insert into [WorkflowInstanceParents] (Child, Parent, Internal) select rec.[Child], rec.[Parent], (case when ph.[Parent] is null then 0 else 1 end) as [Internal] from Rec rec inner join [WorkflowInstance] wi on rec.[Child] = wi.[Id] inner join [WorkflowProcess] wp on wi.[Process] = wp.[Id] inner join [ProcessHeader] ph on wp.[Header] = ph.[Id]

script.name: UpdateInternalWorkflowInstanceParents
script.text: update [WorkflowInstanceParents] set [Internal] = 1 from [WorkflowInstanceParents] rec inner join [WorkflowInstance] wi on rec.[Child] = wi.[Id] inner join [WorkflowProcess] wp on wi.[Process] = wp.[Id] inner join [ProcessHeader] ph on wp.[Header] = ph.[Id] where ph.[Parent] is not null and rec.[Parent] != rec.[Child]

index.name: Idx_WorkflowInstance_Emul
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [Idx_WorkflowInstance_Emul] ON [WorkflowInstance] ([IsEmulation] ASC) INCLUDE ([Id])
